content: Let's rate dairy options from best to worst with scientific backing. Ghee is the best option for a keto diet due to its pure butter fat and short chain fatty acids, especially butyricic acid, which is anti-inflammatory.
Whey protein isolate is also clean, but choose grass-fed organic. It's second best for a keto diet.
Greek or Bulgarian yogurt is third best for keto diet. It has cultures that drive down pH, making calcium and phosphorus more soluble, reducing inflammatory stress.
Heavy cream is fourth best for keto diet. It has less milk solids and casein proteins, but still has lactose and a1 casein.
Cottage cheese is fifth best for keto diet. Organic is better than non-organic. It has casein protein that can be good or bad depending on milk type.
Milk is the worst for keto diet. Raw organic is not exactly what we want and not keto friendly.
